content.text: Thanks! 🎉 The circuit is all set and ready to go. Your 5 colorful LEDs will flash in a smooth sequential pattern. If you ever want to adjust the timing, change colors, add more LEDs, or try different patterns (like all on at once, alternating, or a chase effect), just let me know!
